rulings.Case Title: BETTY UTTERBACK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Special Interrogatories And Judicial Counsel Form Interrogatory Requests; Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, February 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Campbell Soup Company¿s motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiffs must provide further responses to form interrogatories 1.1 and 15.1 and special interrogatories 36-72. Plaintiffs must confirm that, notwithstanding all of their objections, after making a reasonably diligent investigation, they are not aware of any additional non-privileged information responsive to form interrogatory 17.1 and special interrogatories 1-35. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is denied because, given the quantity of interrogatories propounded by it, plaintiffs¿ responses did not lack substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours And Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records And Production Of Documents And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, February 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours and Company¿s person most knowledgeable and production of documents is continued to February 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT RUHL et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER, PERMANENT PROTECTIVE ORDER
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, February 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion for protective order regarding Union Carbide¿s special interrogatories, set three is continued on the court¿s own motion to February 25, 2011 in Department 611 at 10:00am. = (220/JJM)
